233	
234	/**
235	 * Text classification pipeline using any `ModelForSequenceClassification`.
236	 *
237	 * **Example:** Sentiment-analysis w/ `Xenova/distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english`.
238	 * ```javascript
239	 * const classifier = await pipeline('sentiment-analysis', 'Xenova/distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english');
240	 * const output = await classifier('I love transformers!');
241	 * // [{ label: 'POSITIVE', score: 0.999788761138916 }]
242	 * ```
243	 *
244	 * **Example:** Multilingual sentiment-analysis w/ `Xenova/bert-base-multilingual-uncased-sentiment` (and return top 5 classes).
245	 * ```javascript
246	 * const classifier = await pipeline('sentiment-analysis', 'Xenova/bert-base-multilingual-uncased-sentiment');
247	 * const output = await classifier('Le meilleur film de tous les temps.', { top_k: 5 });
248	 * // [
249	 * //   { label: '5 stars', score: 0.9610759615898132 },
250	 * //   { label: '4 stars', score: 0.03323351591825485 },
251	 * //   { label: '3 stars', score: 0.0036155181005597115 },
252	 * //   { label: '1 star', score: 0.0011325967498123646 },
253	 * //   { label: '2 stars', score: 0.0009423971059732139 }
254	 * // ]
255	 * ```
256	 *
257	 * **Example:** Toxic comment classification w/ `Xenova/toxic-bert` (and return all classes).
258	 * ```javascript
259	 * const classifier = await pipeline('text-classification', 'Xenova/toxic-bert');
260	 * const output = await classifier('I hate you!', { top_k: null });
261	 * // [
262	 * //   { label: 'toxic', score: 0.9593140482902527 },
263	 * //   { label: 'insult', score: 0.16187334060668945 },
264	 * //   { label: 'obscene', score: 0.03452680632472038 },
265	 * //   { label: 'identity_hate', score: 0.0223250575363636 },
266	 * //   { label: 'threat', score: 0.019197041168808937 },
267	 * //   { label: 'severe_toxic', score: 0.005651099607348442 }
268	 * // ]
269	 * ```
270	 */
271	export class TextClassificationPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextPipelineConstructorArgs) => TextClassificationPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {
272	
273	    /**
274	     * Create a new TextClassificationPipeline.
275	     * @param {TextPipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
276	     */
277	    constructor(options) {
278	        super(options);
279	    }
280	
281	    /** @type {TextClassificationPipelineCallback} */
282	    async _call(texts, {
283	        top_k = 1
284	    } = {}) {
285	
286	        // Run tokenization
287	        const model_inputs = this.tokenizer(texts, {
288	            padding: true,
289	            truncation: true,
290	        });
291	
292	        // Run model
293	        const outputs = await this.model(model_inputs)
294	
295	        // TODO: Use softmax tensor function
296	        const function_to_apply =
297	            // @ts-expect-error TS2339
298	            this.model.config.problem_type === 'multi_label_classification'
299	                ? batch => batch.sigmoid()
300	                : batch => new Tensor(
301	                    'float32',
302	                    softmax(batch.data),
303	                    batch.dims,
304	                ); // single_label_classification (default)
305	
306	        // @ts-expect-error TS2339
307	        const id2label = this.model.config.id2label;
308	
309	        const toReturn = [];
310	        for (const batch of outputs.logits) {
311	            const output = function_to_apply(batch);
312	
313	            const scores = await topk(output, top_k);
314	
315	            const values = scores[0].tolist();
316	            const indices = scores[1].tolist();
317	            const vals = indices.map((x, i) => ({
318	                label: id2label ? id2label[x] : `LABEL_${x}`,
319	                score: values[i],
320	            }));
321	            if (top_k === 1) {
322	                toReturn.push(...vals);
323	            } else {
324	                toReturn.push(vals);
325	            }
326	        }
327	
328	        return Array.isArray(texts) || top_k === 1 ? /** @type {TextClassificationOutput} */ (toReturn) : /** @type {TextClassificationOutput[]} */ (toReturn)[0];
329	    }
330	}

369	 * const output = await classifier('Sarah lives in the United States of America', { ignore_labels: [] });
370	 * // [

372	 * //   { entity: 'O', score: 0.9987385869026184, index: 2, word: 'lives' },
373	 * //   { entity: 'O', score: 0.9990072846412659, index: 3, word: 'in' },
374	 * //   { entity: 'O', score: 0.9988298416137695, index: 4, word: 'the' },

1987	
1988	        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
1989	        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);
1990	
1991	        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);
1992	
1993	        const toReturn = [];
1994	        for (const batch of pixel_values) {
1995	            batch.dims = [1, ...batch.dims]
1996	            const output = await this.model.generate({ inputs: batch, ...generate_kwargs });
1997	            const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
1998	                skip_special_tokens: true,
1999	            }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }))
2000	            toReturn.push(decoded);
2001	        }
2002	
2003	        return isBatched ? toReturn : toReturn[0];
